source_old_req: The acc3_dataOutput thread shall operate as a periodic task with a period of 4000 ms, a deadline of 500 ms, and a priority of 1. The thread shall accept valid inputs from the acc_command_in event data port and produce outputs on the accout data port. The thread shall ensure that the value of accout is determined exclusively by the current input values from acc_command_in and the internal computations performed by the acc3_dataOutput.impl implementation. The thread shall guarantee that all outputs produced on the accout port conform to the SHM_DataType::accData data type and that the internal state updates do not violate the data type constraints of the accout port. The thread shall execute within the specified compute execution time range of 400 ms to 500 ms.
natural_requirement: The acc3_dataOutput component shall define the implementation-level signal routing for acc3_dataOutput.impl. In the implementation layer, acc3_dataOutput.impl shall route data flow from spg.accDataOut to accout through C1 and control signal from acc_command_in to spg.event_in through C2.

requirement_items.text: The acc3_dataOutput.impl implementation shall route the data flow from spg.accDataOut to accout through connection C1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The acc3_dataOutput.impl implementation shall declare connection C1 from spg.accDataOut to accout.

requirement_items.text: The acc3_dataOutput.impl implementation shall route the control signal from acc_command_in to spg.event_in through connection C2.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The acc3_dataOutput.impl implementation shall declare connection C2 from acc_command_in to spg.event_in.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The acc3_dataOutput.impl implementation shall declare connection C1 from spg.accDataOut to accout. The acc3_dataOutput.impl implementation shall declare connection C2 from acc_command_in to spg.event_in.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The acc3_dataOutput.impl implementation shall route the data flow from spg.accDataOut to accout through connection C1. The acc3_dataOutput.impl implementation shall route the control signal from acc_command_in to spg.event_in through connection C2.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
